title: Geedel Manual Food Chopper, Hand Pull String Vegetable Chopper Onion Chopper Dicer for Kitchen, Easy Cleaning Veg Salad Chopper for Vegetables, Fruits (200 ML)
features: 【Faster Chopping】With three sharp blades, you can quickly cut food by pulling the string just a few times. This food chopper can help you get food easier and save much time to prepare your meals.
【100% Safety】No chance to touch the blades. All parts of the manual food chopper are made from baby food grade material, BPA-Free. Better protects your family's food health.
【Easy to Clean】Each component of the vegetable chopper can be easily cleaned by running water in 15s. The onion chopper is also easy to install.
【Multi-function Food Chopper】Meet your different chopping needs. The pull food chopper dicer is perfect for chopping vegetables, fruits, nuts, such as onion, carrot, zucchini, ice cubes, etc.
【Best Choice For Gift】One month free trial for this food processor, we provide 24-hour customer service and lifelong technical support. It's a great gift for family or friends.
description: Product Description Previous page Tough Drawstring Drawstring with automatic retraction function and ergonomically designed handle, it is more effortless, convenient and comfortable to use than the traditional way of chopping food. With scraper design Thoughtful design for cleaning food on the lid during chopping. Follows the rotation of the blade to prevent a large amount of food from sticking to the lid, while making it easy to clean. 360° Rotating Blade Adopting 420 stainless steel blades with different heights to make the blades easier to achieve fast food chopping during 360° rotation. Reduce the hassle of cleaning cabinets and chopping boards. Non-slip rubber base The rubberised base ensures that the Onion Chopper remains stable when in use, preventing it from slipping like other universal kitchen choppers and making it safer to use. Next page Geedel Manual Pull Food Chopper What are the functions of the onion chopper? He can chop a lot of ingredients that are used on a daily basis, such as garlic, chillies, onions, carrots, chopped nuts, jams, and so on. It is very helpful for me. Can the manual vegetable chopper be non-slip? Yes, it has non-slip strips on the bottom to prevent slipping when cutting manually, but also to hold down with your other hand to be safer. How many blades does the multifunctional chopper have? There are 3 blades which can effectively shred food quickly. There is a scraper design on the top to clean food from the lid.
